Video Idea: 100-200 people survive inside a real abandoned/crafted city for 7 days during a zombie apocalypse. Start with 5 hidden zombies and everyone wears a wristband showing if they’re human, infected, or vaccinated. Zombies infect people by tagging them, but vaccines are hidden around the city and can turn zombies back into survivors. Every hour survivor bracelets ping their location so zombies can hunt them down. There are food/supply drops and daily high-risk challenges for money, weapons, clues, or vaccines. On Day 7, an extraction gate opens and everyone left alive has to make it there before getting infected. Would be like a real-life survival movie mixed with strategy and chaos

The builder built all that in 5000 days and not to mention, such a great build in the end dimension. If I had to choose one, the first place without question would be the 5000 day build. It holds its own and tells such an interesting story. I just love it so much. It might be a little disheartening to not get a reward, so I just wanted to say fantastic job to the 5000 day builder. It was awesome. I’m honestly surprised it didn’t win anything. It was just so good.

as a wise man once said, "I think SkyBlock at its core is the ultimate challenge in resource management. You spawn on a tiny island in an empty universe; all you have is a tree, some supplies, and some dirt to stand on. You have to treasure EVERY dirt block because if one falls into the void, there's no way to replace it. And as you carefully navigate your absurd circumstance, you gain a new appreciation for the few things you have as you meticulously use them to their fullest effect. With nothing but some ice, lava, and saplings, you slowly transform this empty expanse into a world of your very own. SkyBlock teaches us that no matter how ridiculous the odds may seem, within us resides the power to overcome these challenges and acheive something beautiful. And one day, we'll look back at where we started and be amazed by how far we've come."

Further south, there's the Hue Imperial Palace, the Golden Bridge in Da Nang, or relaxing on the beaches in Khanh Hoa. In Dani's video he showcased a funny AF perspective proving that!

How to easily win the challenge:
Step1: Die once
Step2: Don't Respawn
Step3: Wait for others so they have more deaths than you
Step4: Respawn
Step5: You won

btw, the thing that was causing you to die in one or two hits is a mod called First Aid. It makes it so your health is distributed among different body parts on your character, you can see the parts on the bottom right of your screen. If your head or torso (both have 2 hearts each) runs out of hearts its an instant death as those are considered vital body parts. You can have no hearts on your limbs and live but you'll have penalties applied to you until you heal with bandages or healing salves. You can get a good idea of the distribution of the hearts with a button in your inventory window.
